title: Synopsys Appoints Ann Minooka as Chief Marketing Officer
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced the appointment of Ann Minooka as the company's Chief Marketing Officer, reporting to Sassine Ghazi, president and COO of Synopsys.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) & TSMC to Advance Multi-Die System Design
text: Synopsys (SNPS) and TSMC are working together to boost the capabilities of the multi-die system designs using TSMC's 3DFabric technologies and 3Dblox 2.0 standard.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) is an Incredible Growth Stock: 3 Reasons Why
text: Synopsys (SNPS) could produce exceptional returns because of its solid growth attributes.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) Unveils Automotive-Grade IP for N5A Process
text: Synopsys (SNPS) unveils its latest automotive-grade Interface and Foundation IP, which is designed for TSMC's N5A process.

title: Keysight, Synopsys, and Ansys Accelerate RFIC Semiconductor Design with New Reference Flow for TSMC's Advanced 4nm RF FinFET Process
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #Ansys--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS), Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS), and Ansys (Nasdaq: ANSS) announced a new reference flow for the TSMC N4PRF, the world's leading semiconductor foundry's advanced 4 nanometer (nm) radio frequency (RF) FinFET process technology. The reference flow is based on the Synopsys Custom Design Family, which provides a complete RF design solution for customers seeking an open RF design environment with higher predictive accuracy.

title: Synopsys and TSMC Streamline Multi-Die System Complexity with Unified Exploration-to-Signoff Platform and Proven UCIe IP on TSMC N3E Process
text: Comprehensive Multi-Die System Design Solution Supports 3Dblox 2.0 Standard and TSMC 3DFabricTM Technologies to Boost Productivity for Fast Heterogeneous Integration Highlights: Synopsys 3DIC Compiler integrates with 3Dblox 2.0 standard for heterogeneous integration and a complete exploration-to-signoff solution. Synopsys UCIe PHY IP, which achieved first-pass silicon success on TSMC N3E process, provides low-latency, low-power, and high-bandwidth die-to-die connectivity.

title: Synopsys' (SNPS) Design Flows Get Certification for N2 Process
text: Synopsys' (SNPS) digital and analog design flows receive the certification for TSMC's N2 process technology.

title: Interested in Arm Holdings? These 2 Chip Stocks Are Growing Even Faster and Are More Reasonably Valued.
text: Arm Holdings, which just debuted on the market, looks overvalued given its growth prospects. Synopsys and Cadence are two other attractive bets on the future of chip design.

title: Synopsys Unveils Industry's Broadest Portfolio of Automotive-Grade IP on TSMC's N5A Process Technology
text: Adopted by Multiple Leading Companies, Synopsys Interface and Foundation IP Enable High Reliability for ADAS SoCs Highlights: New Synopsys IP for the TSMC N5A meets automotive Grade 2 temperature and AEC-Q100 requirements to enable high SoC reliability for long-term operation. ISO 26262 ASIL B- and D- compliant IP assessed for random hardware faults helps meet target ASILs.

title: Synopsys and TSMC Advance Analog Design Migration with Reference Flow Across Advanced TSMC Processes
text: AI-Driven Analog Design Migration Flow, Powered by Synopsys.ai EDA Suite, Boosts Productivity for Analog and Mixed-Signal SoCs    Highlights: AI-driven design solution enables circuit optimization, saving weeks of manual and iterative effort while increasing design quality. Interoperable process design kits for all advanced TSMC FinFET nodes help jumpstart analog designs.

title: Synopsys and TSMC Collaborate to Accelerate 2nm Innovation for Advanced SoC Design with Certified Digital and Analog Design Flows
text: Design Flow Achieved Multiple Successful Test Chip Tape-Outs on TSMC N2 Process; Broad IP Portfolio in Development to Speed Time to Market Highlights: Synopsys' certified digital and analog design flows enhance quality of results for high-performance compute, mobile, and AI designs. Analog design migration flow, powered by Synopsys.ai™ EDA suite, enable rapid design migration across TSMC process nodes.

title: Synopsys Recognized as a Leader in Static Application Security Testing by Independent Research Firm
text: Synopsys received the second highest score in the current offering category and tied for the second highest scores in the strategy and market presence categories SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Sept. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced it has been recognized as a leader in The Forrester Wave™: Static Application Security Testing, Q3 2023.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) Unveils IP Compatible With Intel's PCIe 6.0
text: Synopsys (SNPS), for the first time, exhibits compatibility between its PCIe 6.0 IP and Intel's test chip for PCIe 6.0, achieving an impressive operating speed of 64 GT/s.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) Just Flashed Golden Cross Signal: Do You Buy?
text: Synopsys (SNPS) is looking like an interesting pick from a technical perspective, as the company reached a key level of support. Recently, SNPS crossed above the 20-day moving average, suggesting a short-term bullish trend.

title: Synopsys Demonstrates Industry's First Interoperability of PCI Express 6.0 IP with Intel's PCIe 6.0 Test Chip
text: Joint 64 GT/s Demo Showcases Successful Interoperability, Reducing Integration Risk for Advanced High-Performance Computing SoCs SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Sept. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced that its collaboration with Intel has achieved end-to-end 64 GT/s interoperability between Synopsys' IP for PCI Express (PCIe) 6.0 and Intel's PCIe 6.0-enabled test chip.

title: Synopsys Extends Synopsys.ai EDA Suite with Industry's First Full-Stack Big Data Analytics Solution
text: AI-driven Data Continuum Harnesses Untapped, Actionable Insights to Boost Productivity Across Design, Manufacturing, Testing, and In-Field Deployment Highlight s: Comprehensive AI-driven data analytics solution aggregates and utilizes data across IC design, test, and manufacturing flow to drive more intelligent decision making.
